DataType.Name: ORT_Vision_Responses
DataType.Description: Responses to general requests. Sent from the vision system to the PLC

Member.Name: iEdit
Member.Description: A copy of the edit request once it is received and processed

Member.Name: bStartupInProgress
Member.Description: A vision system startup is in progress

Member.Name: bStartupComplete
Member.Description: The vision system has successfully started

Member.Name: bHeartbeat
Member.Description: The heartbeat from the vision system to the PLC. Updated approximately every second.
